SUMMARY

WINNERS. POC president Abraham Tolentino (third from left) celebrates with Paris Olympics medalists (from left) Nesthy Petecio, Carlos Yulo, and Aira Villegas.

POC

MANILA, Philippines – The rewards continue to pour for double Olympic gold medalistCarlos Yuloand bronze medalistsNesthy PetecioandAira Villegas.

The Philippine Olympic Committee (POC) awarded the promised houses to the Paris Olympics medalists on Tuesday, September 3, with the official home turnover set soon “in a ceremony fit for champions” in Tagaytay City.

Yulo, the gymnastics ace who became the first Filipino to win two gold medals in the Olympics, received a two-story home sitting on a 500-square meter lot valued at around P15 million.

Petecio and Villegas, who both won a bronze in boxing, got brand new bungalows.

“All the rewards and bonuses that go our medalists’ way are well-deserved. It’s not easy to medal in the Olympics. It takes years, it takes focus, discipline, and determination,” said POC president Abraham “Bambol” Tolentino.

“These athletes invested their lives into the sports they love, and now, they’re reaping the fruits of their sacrifices.”

With the latest reward, Tagaytay has turned into a city of Olympians of sorts asHidilyn Diaz, the weightlifting star who delivered the Philippines’ first Olympic gold, also got rewarded by POC with a house and lot in the Cavite tourist destination after her historic Tokyo Olympics campaign in 2021.

Petecio, who also won a silver in the last Olympics, received her second Tagaytay home. In the Tokyo Games reward, her neighbors include fellow silver winner Carlo Paalam and bronze medalist Eumir Marcial.

“It’s now a tradition. First Hidilyn Diaz deserved all the best for giving the country its first Olympic gold medal, and now, it’s the turn of Caloy, Nesthy, and Aira to be feted with the same reward for their historic efforts,” said Tolentino.

“The POC doesn’t think twice about these rewards. An Olympic medal, regardless of color, is the most precious medal in sports.”– Rappler.com

title: POC gifts new Tagaytay homes to Paris Olympics medalists
author: Jasmine Payo
description: The Philippine Olympic Committee rewards Paris Games champion Carlos Yulo and bronze medalists Nesthy Petecio and Aira Villegas new homes in Tagaytay City ‘for their historic efforts’
